label: Cron Schedule
description: Fire on a schedule. Standard cron expression in the `cron` field.

inputs.name: cron
inputs.label: Cron
inputs.description: Standard cron expression. Default fires every 5 minutes.

outputs.name: scheduledTime
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the scheduled fire time

outputs.name: actualTime
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the firing actually happened
